objective: 產品問題衝刺: 提升交付深度 — 14 個任務在 40 分鐘內完成，可能過於表面
task_draft_markdown:
產品問題衝刺: 提升交付深度 — 14 個任務在 40 分鐘內完成，可能過於表面

User Value: When 14 sprints complete in 40 minutes, the worker is likely generating boilerplate rather than real product improvements. Users deserve code that actually runs and changes their experience.

Product Maturity Impact: Sprint velocity metrics are meaningless if the delivery is scaffolding. This sprint must produce at least one file change that can be verified by running the test suite.

Expected Change: The completed delivery includes a verified changed_files list with at least 2 real modified files and passing test evidence.

Objective: Pick the highest-priority area from the product backlog and make a real, verifiable code change. No scaffolding, no placeholder text.

Phase 1: Read the 5 most recent completed.md files. Identify what actually changed vs. what was scaffolding.
Phase 2: Pick the area with the most scaffolding and no real change. Make the actual code change that was promised.
Phase 3: Run make backend-test to confirm the change works.
Phase 4: Update completed.md with exact file names changed, line counts, and test output as evidence.

Scope: backend/app/, frontend/app/platform/
Acceptance Criteria: changed_files list contains ≥2 real modified files; make backend-test passes; completed.md cites specific line numbers changed.
focus_keys: delivery_depth, code_quality, test_coverage, real_changes
expected_duration_minutes: 480
user_value: When 14 sprints complete in 40 minutes, the worker is likely generating boilerplate rather than real product improvements. Users deserve code that actually runs and changes their experience.
product_maturity_impact: Sprint velocity metrics are meaningless if the delivery is scaffolding. This sprint must produce at least one file change that can be verified by running the test suite.
expected_change: The completed delivery includes a verified changed_files list with at least 2 real modified files and passing test evidence.
scope: Complete the smallest meaningful increment toward the objective.
Leave machine-readable artifacts for orchestrator validation.
constraints: Do not claim acceptance without evidence.
禁止在任何輸出中包含以下詞句："SIGNAL_EXHAUSTED", "NO_SIGNAL", "停止建議", "目前沒有方向"。每個 Focus 必須有獨立的量化結論。
handoff_questions: What is the next highest-priority backlog item after this task?
Did the worker leave any unresolved risk that needs a replan?
How should planner handle follow-up for task #238?
